title: MESOTHELIOMA PROGNOSIS NETWORK - 211info
text: MESOTHELIOMA PROGNOSIS NETWORK MESOTHELIOMA PROGNOSIS NETWORK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers specialized information and referral services, resource navigation assistance, and online support groups. Provides limited financial assistance to people with mesothelioma. Also assists veterans get VA Disability Compensation for asbestos-related illnesses. 200 Continental Drive Suite 401 #504 Newark, DE 19713 Eligibility: People impacted by mesothelioma and asbestos exposure Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 615-2270 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 615-2270 Patient Advocates Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for information or to chat with a Patient Advocate FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Cancer Medical Care Expense Assistance * Cancer Medical Information Services * Cancer Personal Health Care Advocate Services * Cancer Specialized Information and Referral * Cancer If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MESOTHELIOMA PROGNOSIS NETWORK
